_doc: Essence Storage — visible storage prop for the essence resource. Same pattern as wood-storage. Reuses the player's stacking pipeline (InventoryStack + StackSystem). Visual ID: cyan body + pale teal rim cap. 2026-05-11: `spawn.cost` added so the right-edge SpawnMenu BUILD ▸ Ess. Box chip can read the cost and gate placement. Cost derives from balance.economy.essence_storage.
